family.background: A close-knit Brahmin family rooted in integrity, education, and tradition. Both father and brother are legal professionals.

highlights: Architect configuration-driven ML training and deployment pipelines using GitLab CI/CD, CDSW, and MLflow
Redesigned model pipelines to a single parameterized CI/CD system enabling N-model × M-environment deployments
Developed 'aes_cdsw_api' — an internal Python library standardizing CDSW model releases from GitLab CI
Designed dual-workspace Azure ML promotion architectures with Ansible-based orchestration

career.role: Senior Software Engineer – DevOps & Python Automation
highlights: Built Python automation integrating RTC, RQM, and Jenkins REST APIs into Grafana and InfluxDB dashboards
Maintained over 50 CI build pipelines, reducing resolution times to ~20 minutes
Developed data ingestion utilities for large-scale enterprise build infrastructure
Also performed with the employee rock band at an interstate music competition
Deployed and managed multi-node Kubernetes clusters supporting 20+ containerized services at 99.9% uptime
Configured autoscaling, resource quotas, and workload scheduling
Built Docker packaging pipelines for consistent containerized deployments

projects.name: Config-Driven ML Platform
projects.description: Configuration-driven ML platform using GitLab CI/CD, CDSW, and Azure ML to automate training pipelines. Replaced manual model releases with fully automated workflows.

projects.name: Python API Integration & CI Metrics Automation
projects.description: Automated collection for 50+ build pipelines integrating RTC, RQM, and Jenkins REST APIs to stream real-time metrics to Grafana/InfluxDB.

values.description: My values come from my family upbringing in Bihar. Integrity, family-first thinking, discipline, and respect guide every decision I make — personally and professionally.

goals.career: Grow into an AI & Infrastructure Leadership role within 1–3 years
goals.family: Support parents' health and comfort; build a happy, values-driven family
goals.personal: Continuous learning, upskilling in AI/ML, and staying physically fit

lifestyle.dailyRoutine: Wake at 5:30 AM → Gym 6:00–7:30 AM → Work 9:00 AM–6:00 PM → Upskilling 7:00–8:30 PM → Family time 9:00–10:00 PM → Sleep 10:30 PM
lifestyle.discipline: Highly structured daily routine built around fitness, professional growth, and family connection

achievements: 6+ years of engineering experience across startups, enterprise, and global banking

Architected a config-driven ML platform at UBS replacing manual model releases
Performed with employee rock band at Bosch interstate music competition
First Class B.Tech graduate from Anna University

marriageProfile.personality: Disciplined, family-oriented, ambitious, warm, and respectful
marriageProfile.lookingFor: An educated, family-oriented, respectful, and ambitious life partner who values mutual trust, emotional support, and shared family roots
strengths: Stable and growing career in AI/ML
Deep-rooted family values and respect for elders
Disciplined lifestyle — fitness, continuous learning, structure
Warm and caring nature — family time is protected daily
marriageProfile.familyValues: Family comes first. I protect daily family time. I respect my parents and elders deeply. I believe a happy home is built on mutual trust and shared values.
marriageProfile.lifestyle: Structured but warm — mornings for fitness, days for professional excellence, evenings for family connection
marriageProfile.longTermVision: A happy, values-driven family life with mutual respect, professional growth, and care for our parents

Completed Class XII (CBSE, Science) from Radiant International School, Patna
Moved to Coimbatore — started B.Tech in Information Technology at CIT
Graduated B.Tech First Class from Anna University. Joined Kalycito Infotech as DevOps Engineer
Joined Bosch Global Software Technology as Senior Software Engineer
Joined Accenture (Client: UBS) as Senior MLOps Engineer — relocated to Pune
